notes: STRUCTURAL FIX #2: push (graph-webhook.ts) was ALSO capped by the same interactive manual-call budget that #587 fixed for cron -- owner caught it ('why are we still at cron's mercy' when push is the primary delivery path). Renamed isCronTriggered->isAutomatedTrigger; deliverWorkdayPresence now auto-infers isAutomatedTrigger:true for trigger:'push' so push callers can never forget it. See LESSONS_LEARNED #35 addendum.
